name: ITP Hammer Golden Fixture Corpus
description: A small, hand-built, deterministic fixture corpus used by tests/integration/logic/hammers/test_end_to_end_hammer.py and tests/integration/logic/hammers/test_adversarial_hammer.py (HAMMER-014) as the golden corpus underpinning the end-to-end and adversarial hammer test suites. Statements are simplified/synthetic Nat identities that follow real Lean4 naming and import conventions, not a real excerpt of Mathlib4. The corpus revision computed from this file is asserted stable across test runs.

theorems.statement: theorem add_comm : forall a b : Nat, Nat.add a b = Nat.add b a
theorem add_zero : forall a : Nat, Nat.add a Nat.zero = a
theorem add_assoc : forall a b c : Nat, Nat.add (Nat.add a b) c = Nat.add a (Nat.add b c)
theorem mul_comm : forall a b : Nat, Nat.mul a b = Nat.mul b a
theorem eq_refl : forall a : Nat, a = a
theorem zero_add : forall a : Nat, Nat.add Nat.zero a = a
